hero.subtitle: Not Google Docs. Not Final Draft. A professional tool with an AI assistant — right in your browser.
hero.bottomNote: Free · No card required · No install

painPoints.title: How do you write now?
painPoints.conclusion: YOMI Script is one tool instead of three.

googleDocs.title: Google Docs
googleDocs.desc: Great for text. Not for screenplays. Formatting is manual. Before submission — an hour lost.

finalDraft.title: Final Draft
finalDraft.desc: Industry standard. $250 one-time. Desktop only. Requires download and installation.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp + PDF
whatsapp.desc: Notes in messages. Versions get lost. "Final_final_v3_edits.pdf" — sound familiar?

formatting.title: Screenplay formatting
formatting.desc: 6 element types: scene heading, action, character, dialogue, parenthetical, transition. Keyboard shortcuts. Auto-format.

rewrite.title: Smart assistant (Cmd+K)
rewrite.desc: Select text, describe what to change — get a variant with highlighted diffs. Apply or dismiss with one click. Your voice stays yours.

chat.title: AI chat with project context
chat.desc: The chat knows your screenplay, bible, and notes. Helps you get unstuck — doesn't write for you.

versions.title: Versions and drafts
versions.desc: Save snapshots, browse history, restore any version.

series.title: TV series and episodes
series.desc: TV format: multiple episodes in one project, each with its own document.

export.title: Export to PDF and DOCX
export.desc: Customize title page, scene numbering, paper size, and watermark.

ai.quote: Stuck on a scene? Ask for a rewrite. Dialogue sounds wooden? Show it — get alternatives. AI explains what works and why.
ai.description: In film, working with a team is the norm. Editor, director, producer — everyone helps make the story better. AI in Script Workspace is another team member. Not a replacement for the author.

screenwriters.title: Screenwriters
screenwriters.desc: A professional tool instead of Google Docs and Final Draft. Formatting, versions, smart assistant — all in your browser.

showrunners.title: Showrunners
showrunners.desc: Manage your series in one workspace. Episodes, project bible, structure — at your fingertips.

producers.title: Producers
producers.desc: Review and comment on your team's work. No more sorting through PDFs in your inbox.

pricing.title: Start
pricing.betaOffer: Register before May 1, 2026 — get PRO free for 3 months

betaStory.subtitle: YOMI Script is a young product. We don't hide it.
betaStory.forYou1: Free PRO access during beta (until May 1, 2026)
betaStory.forYou2: Your feedback directly shapes what we build next
betaStory.forYou3: You'll be among the first to master the tool before it grows
betaStory.guarantee2: We don't use your text to train models

yomi.description1: We're a team that works in film production and builds tools for the industry. Not generic products "for everyone," but services that understand your workflow: how the screenwriting process works, how productions run, what a showrunner needs.
yomi.description2: YOMI Script is the first YOMI product. But not the last.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: YOMI Script is a browser-based screenplay editor with a smart AI assistant. It replaces Final Draft and Google Docs, supporting professional screenplay formatting, AI rewriting, comments, versions, and export to PDF/DOCX.
faq.q2: How is it different from Final Draft or Celtx?
faq.a2: YOMI Script runs right in your browser — no installation needed. A built-in AI assistant helps rewrite dialogue, analyze structure, and break through creative blocks. Available in multiple languages.
faq.a3: Select text in the screenplay, press Cmd+K (or Ctrl+K), and describe what you want to change. AI will generate a variant and you'll see a diff with highlighted changes — green for additions, red for deletions. Apply or dismiss with one click.
faq.q4: Do I need a separate ChatGPT/Claude subscription?
faq.a4: No. All AI models are already connected and work out of the box. Depending on your plan, you get access to GPT, Claude, DeepSeek, and more. No additional subscriptions required.
faq.a5: Yes. Data is encrypted (AES-256-GCM). Your screenplays are stored on secure servers in the EU. We do not use your content to train models.
faq.q6: When will the stable version be released?
faq.a6: The product is currently in open beta. We're actively improving functionality based on user feedback. Join the beta to influence the product's development.
faq.q7: Can I collaborate with a team?
faq.a7: Yes. You can invite members to a project with different roles: editor, commenter, or viewer. Comments are tied to specific positions in the text and support threads.
faq.a8: YOMI is a team that works in film production. Servers are in the EU, data is protected. Payment is available via Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal.
faq.a9: We want to build the tool together with the community. Early users get free PRO access and the ability to shape the product.

cta.description: Get beta access — free, no card required, right now. Offer valid until May 1, 2026.

footer.security: Data encrypted with AES-256 · We don't train models on your text

betaBanner.text: The app is in active testing. You may encounter bugs or rough edges. We'd love your feedback —
betaBanner.textEnd: , and we'll help at every step.
